patch.value: Close c8-exposed coverage gaps in src/cli/commands/create.ts to 100%

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text:
Closed all c8-exposed coverage gaps in src/cli/commands/create.ts to genuine 100% (focused run: 0 uncovered stmt/fn/br). KEY ENVIRONMENT FINDING: in this vitest v8 setup, inline '/* c8 ignore next */' and '/* v8 ignore next */' are NOT honored — only '/* c8 ignore start */ ... /* c8 ignore stop */' block form works (verified via a probe). The pre-existing ineffective 'c8 ignore next' markers were previously masked because the broken 'c8 ignore end' (not 'stop') left start-blocks open to EOF; once those were fixed to 'stop', the gaps surfaced. NOTE: the working tree was reset by a parallel agent mid-session, reverting the end->stop fixes and two of my edits — I re-applied all four end->stop fixes (lines ~409/425/597/1278) plus my conversions.

REAL TESTS ADDED (12 new, all in tests/unit/commands/create-command.spec.ts under new describe 'runCreate c8-exposed coverage gaps (pm-eifq)'): plain-text comment/note/learning seeds (br 611, parseCsvKv-throw path); governance create_default_type fallback (stmt 1246-1248); built-in Task fallback (stmt 1249/1251); explicit strict-mode skips default-type fallback (br 1244); empty description '?? ""' (br 1834); strict required-option targeted by --unset incl. localeCompare sort (stmt 974, br); repeatable clear+value conflict --clear-deps+--dep (stmt 1398, br 1397); scalar --unset+value conflict (stmt 1448 left branch); runtime schema field value persisted incl. spread truthy branches (br 1892/1929 left, stmt 1526/1527, br 1530 left); extension item-field allowed-value validation failure -> catch (stmt 1900, br 1904 left); template options merged from active templates-show handler (stmt 1208/1235/1236, br 1201 success); unresolved template with no warnings (br 1203 false side); blocked-by derives non-default blocked status via sort (stmt+fn 1769/1773, two blocked statuses); blocked-by with NO blocked statuses degrades to open_status (br 1773 '?? open_status' right side).

C8-IGNORE (start/stop) ADDED for PROVABLY-UNREACHABLE defensive guards: (1) parseLogSeed rethrow — optionName is type-narrowed to comment|note|learning so the else is unreachable; (2) hasOptionValue 'return false' — only canonical CREATE_COMMAND_OPTION_KEYS reach it, all present in scalarValues/repeatableValues; (3) typeDefinition undefined throw — resolvedTypeName came from a successful resolveTypeName so resolveTypeDefinition never returns undefined; (4) scalar unset '?? optionKey' — every scalarOptionPresence key is in CREATE_OPTION_KEY_TO_UNSET_CANONICAL; (5) three 'runtimeCreateFieldValues.values ?? {}' fallbacks — collectRuntimeCreateFieldValues always returns a values object; (6) extension-validation catch 'instanceof Error ? : fallback' — that path only throws Error instances. NO test-only exports added. Only create.ts + create-command.spec.ts modified.

patch.value: src/cli/commands/create.ts driven to genuine 100% coverage (0 uncovered statements/functions/branches in focused run, 102 tests pass). Added 12 real tests + 6 justified c8-ignore start/stop blocks for provably-unreachable defensive guards; re-applied the 4 end->stop fixes after a parallel-agent working-tree reset. No test-only exports added.
